# UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.header

**Case**

The style to use for a section header.

## Declaration

```swift
case header
```

## Discussion

When using this style, a tap anywhere in the header toggles the expansion state of the item. The cell itself is not selectable when using this style.

## Constants

- **UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.automatic**: The system automatically determines the style depending on whether the cell’s configuration is as a section header.
- **UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.cell**: The style to use for a selectable cell with nested children.
